channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Isn’t it a disgrace that “independent” Zimbabwe has had only two leaders in 46 years yet colonial Rhodesia had eight? @thezimbabwean
item.description: via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: ‘Cultural dialogue a key pillar of Zim-China relations’, Ambassador Zhou
item.description: via Herald.co.zw #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Herald.co.zw

item.title: Too Much Unprotected Lula Lula and Beitbridge’s Dark Secret: Unmasking the Surge in Child Abuse and STIs
item.description: Beitbridge, a bustling border town nestled on Zimbabwe’s southern frontier, is grappling with a crisis far more insidious than its vibrant cross-border trade suggests. Beneath the veneer of commerce and transit lies a disturbing reality: a significant and escalating surge in case via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Air Force warns public over Hatfield golf course stands @bulawayo24
item.description: THE Air Force of Zimbabwe (AFZ) has warned members of the public against purchasing residential stands at the Hatfield Golf Course in Harare, insisting that the property remains military land and is n... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Namibia Joins South Africa and Zimbabwe in Bold Southern Africa Big Tourism Alliance to Attract Global Travelers
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: The Great Diaspora Takeover: How Zimbos Abroad are Quietly Buying Zimbabwe
item.description: A silent revolution is unfolding across the Zimbabwean landscape, from the rolling hills of the Mashonaland countryside to the manicured lawns of Harare’s most exclusive suburbs. While the local economy continues to grapple with the complexities of currency shifts and inflationar via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Bikita Minerals Resumes Lithium Concentrate Exports After Brief Suspension
item.description: Bikita Minerals resumes lithium exports as global demand rises, positioning Zimbabwe as a key supplier in battery mineral markets industry The post Bikita Minerals Resumes Lithium Concentrate Exports After Brief Suspension appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe’s Public Sector Urged to Ditch ‘Command Culture’ as Leadership Forum Pushes Governance Reset @263Chat
item.description: Zimbabwe Leadership Forum chairperson Canaan Dube said many public institutions still operate through outdated command-and-control structures that weaken trust, disconnect executives from operational realities and undermine effective decision-making. The post Zimbabwe’s Public Se via 263chat #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Legal Discussions with Vengai Madzima: Sale of Land by Instalments in Zimbabwe
item.description: NewZimbabwe.com has invited Mr. Vengai Madzima, the Senior Partner at Madzima Chidyausiku Museta Legal Practitioners (MCM legal) to discuss legal issues that affect Zimbabweans. The discussions are of a general nature and those seeking specific legal advise should contact their r via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Karoi, Catholic Church seal deal on training college @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Karoi, Catholic Church seal deal on training college –Newsday Zimbabwe KAROI Town Council and the Catholic Church have sealed a deal to establish a teachers’ training college in Hurungwe District, with classes expected to commence in September this year after seven years via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Foreign equity fund acquires majority stake in medical technology firm @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Foreign equity fund acquires majority stake in medical technology firm -Newsday Zimbabwe HARARE, May 17 (NewsDay Live) — Zimbabwe’s Competition and Tariff Commission (CTC) has approved the proposed acquisition of an 88.1% stake in Vertice Medtech Holdings Proprietary Limi via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation
